zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Stuteville於大約1225年出生在英國諾福爾可格雷哈爾時，她的父親William de Stuteville38歲，母親Margaret de Saye45歲。她與Richard Foliot結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1271年在英國諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Stuteville于大约1225年出生在英国諾福爾可格雷哈爾时，她的父亲William de Stuteville38岁，母亲Margaret de Saye45岁。她与Richard Foliot结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1271年在英国諾廷加姆爾素維爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Stuteville was born about 1225, in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, her father, William de Stuteville, was 38 and her mother, Margaret de Saye, was 45. She married Richard Foliot. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1271, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Stuteville est née environ 1225, à Gressenhall, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William de Stuteville, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Saye, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Foliot. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1271, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Stuteville um 1225 in Gressenhall, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Stuteville 38 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Saye 45. Sie hat Richard Foliot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1271 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Stuteville è nata il circa 1225 nel Gressenhall, Norfolk, England, sua padre, William de Stuteville, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Saye, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Richard Foliot. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1271, nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Stutevilleが約1225年にイギリスノーフォルクグレセンハルで生まれた時，父William de Stutevilleは38歳，母Margaret de Sayeは45歳であった。Richard Foliotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1271年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアソウスウエルで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Stuteville(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 노르폴크 그레센홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Stuteville(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Saye(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Richard Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 영국 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Stuteville nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Stuteville, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Saye, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Foliot. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1271, em Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Stuteville родилась около 1225 г. в местности грессенолл, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Stuteville было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Saye, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Foliot. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1271 г. в местности соутвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Stuteville nació aproximadamente 1225, en Gressenhall, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Stuteville, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret de Saye, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Richard Foliot. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1271, en Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
